name: How long until I get my first workers comp check in Utah?

mainEntity.name: How long until I get my first workers comp check in Utah?

acceptedAnswer.description: Typically 21-45 days after reports if approved; indemnity after 3-7 missed days.[2] Key factors: Insurer contacts employer for wages. Practical guidance: Submit doctor notes; push if delayed. Advances possible for hardship.
